name: ai-software-delivery-room
description: A complete multi-agent software delivery system for Claude — idea discovery (brief, roadmap, business case, use cases), architecture, script-driven sprint execution with a universal plan→build→independent-QA triad, product-integrity traceability with drift detection and cross-sprint regression, live E2E (Cypress) testing, git workflow, risk gating, and release packaging. The state machine lives in bundled scripts and templates, not the model's memory.
